{{Infobox construct
| name = Yerin's Goldsign
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Goldsign]] is a manifestation granted to individuals who have reached the [[Gold stage]] of their [[Path]], serving as a visible indicator of their progression and specific discipline. These features are produced when a person holds a [[Remnant]] within their core, providing an additional capability beyond standard abilities. While different [[Paths]] produce various forms—such as green clouds or serpents—[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] take the form of silver, [[steel]]-like bladed arms that emerge from her body. These appendages function as highly effective offensive tools, capable of deflecting attacks, striking enemies with precision, and channeling [[sword madra]] more efficiently than her fingernails. As [[Yerin]]'s strength increases, the number of these silver arms can grow, and they become more physically solid and defined. They are integral to her combat style, allowing her to execute advanced techniques like the [[Endless Sword]] by gathering [[aura]] around multiple blades simultaneously.}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] is a flashing arm of [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is getting better with her [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Goldsign]] that draws back like a snake.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] is a silver arm ending in a blade like a scorpion’s stinger.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Goldsign]] that can arch.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] has a [[Goldsign]] that sometimes slips from her control.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
